title: SVNIT Notification 2026 - Apply for Junior Research Fellow Posts
description: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology, Surat (SVNIT) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 01 Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their CV to the email address mentioned below. Here, we provided more details about the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for the SVNIT Notification 2026 .
